positive: A whimsical, stylized portrait of a majestic golden retriever wearing a whimsical, oversized sailor hat and monocle, standing on a floating crescent moon. The scene should have a deep indigo night sky backdrop filled with nebulae and subtle constellations. The art style must be modern vector illustration mixed with ethereal watercolor washes, utilizing strong black outlines for maximum print clarity. Composition must be central, showing the dog's full silhouette against the bright moon and nebula. Color palette should be limited to golds, deep blues, whites, and accent touches of cosmic purple. Highly detailed, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Studio light, dramatic contrast, high contrast, clean lines, flat graphic design, minimalist.
negative: blur, ugly, worst quality, lowres, artifact, grainy, amateur, text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, out of frame, messy lines
